headline: Walmart Cuts Food Prices, but Shoppers Are Fed Up
summary: The discount retailer is lowering thousands of prices, but grocery chains are too. The problem: Americans have lost their patience, and so has Wall Street.

headline: Mid-Year 2026 U.S. Retail/Restaurant Outlook
